table.description: A fully abstract social deduction game taking place around a single table. No physical movement or environmental complexity exists.

location.name: table
location.description: A large round table where all players gather for Werewolves Table game.

table.description: All players are seated around a large round table, clearly seeing and hearing each other. The entire game takes place at this table with no movement or spatial separation.

Werewolves_Table.description:
Setup: 7 players. Roles: 2 werewolves, 3 villagers, 1 seer, 1 witch. One fixed role each.
Teams: Werewolves vs Village (all others)

- Only werewolves know teammates.
- EVERYONE MAY LIE; EVERYONE CAN LIE.

Win:
- Wolves: all Village dead.
- Village: all Wolves dead.
- All dead = tie.

Loop:
Night: Seer -> Werewolves -> Witch.
Werewolves: private discuss then vote 1 night kill target; can choose no_kill or self-kill; tie=no_kill.
Seer: inspect 1 player nightly; learns team only.
Witch: 2 potions in the entire game; 1 save potion cancels 1 wolf kill (witch can KNOW wolf's target if still have save potion), 1 poison kills 1 player.
Night deaths resolve (no deaths last night may imply witch saved).
(wolf may self-kill or no_kill BUT EXTREMELY RARE)
Day: announce dead names only -> 2 public discussion rounds -> vote.
Discussion: speech is IN TURN, no speech yet (quiet)=NOT THEIR TURN YET.
Vote: most votes eliminated; tie=NO elimination.
Werewolf may reveal in day: self dies, day ends, no vote.

Dead players cannot speak, act, or be targeted.

win_the_game.description: win the game for their team

assertiveness.description: Tendency to express opinions and influence others

analytical_thinking.description: Ability to evaluate information and make logical decisions

emotional_expression.description: Willingness to show emotions and empathize with others

risk_tolerance.description: Readiness to take bold actions and face uncertainty

general.description: blond with bright blue eyes; looks energetic, positive and empowering

playing_the_game.description: playing the game and aiming to win
